agents.description: Use this agent to plan and decompose tasks, validate implementation approaches against the spec spine, and produce structured work plans. Triggered when asked to plan, design, decompose, or architect a change — or before starting any complex feature.
agents.name: architect

agents.description: Encore.ts framework specialist for stagecraft service development
agents.name: encore-expert

agents.description: Use this agent to investigate the codebase, gather context, trace dependencies, and answer questions about how things work. Triggered when asked to explore, search, trace, find, or explain existing code or architecture.
agents.name: explorer

agents.description: Use this agent to execute focused code changes from an existing plan. Triggered when asked to implement, apply, code, build, or write changes — especially when a plan or spec already exists.
agents.name: implementer

agents.description: Use this agent to review code changes for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and spec compliance. Triggered after implementation, or when asked to review, audit, or check recent changes.
agents.name: reviewer

commands.description: Run dead code and duplicate detection, get categorized cleanup recommendations
commands.name: cleanup

commands.description: Multi-aspect code review using parallel sub-agents with adaptive agent selection
commands.name: code-review

commands.description: Create a git commit with an impact-focused conventional commit message
commands.name: commit

commands.description: Execute a plan file step-by-step with progress tracking and phase checkpoints
commands.name: implement-plan

commands.description: Initialize an open-agentic-platform session by loading core repository context, recent activity, and memory before implementation work begins.
commands.name: init

commands.description: Modularize large CLAUDE.md files with path-scoped rules and doc extraction
commands.name: refactor-claude-md

commands.description: Deep research with parallel sub-agents, query classification, and filesystem artifact passing
commands.name: research

commands.description: Review all changes in the current branch with structured read-only analysis across risk, quality, and platform compatibility dimensions.
commands.name: review-branch

commands.description: Run the local fast CI loop (`make ci`) and automatically fix discovered issues using concurrent agents
commands.name: validate-and-fix

schemas.description: Open Agentic Platform — compiled codebase index (spec 101)
schemas.name: codebase-index.schema
